summary: Tested Team Performance Leaderboard and Agent Onboarding Wizard features. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Leaderboard shows agent rankings with medal icons, conversion rates. Onboarding wizard has 5 steps working correctly with proper role-based access control.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin can access team-leaderboard endpoint
Backend: Manager can access team-leaderboard endpoint
Backend: Agent can access team-leaderboard endpoint
Backend: Leaderboard entry has all required fields (agent_name, total_loans, sanction_amount, disbursed_amount, disbursed_count, rank, conversion_rate)
Backend: Leaderboard sorted by disbursed_amount descending
Backend: Leaderboard ranks are sequential starting from 1
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates basic agent
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates agent with team_code
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates agent with assigned_banks
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates agent with assigned_categories and assigned_products
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates manager
Backend: POST /api/auth/register fails for duplicate email
Backend: GET /api/master/banks returns 97 banks
Backend: GET /api/master/categories returns 6 categories
Backend: GET /api/master/products returns 6 products
Backend: GET /api/users returns managers for selection
UI: Admin Dashboard shows Team Performance Leaderboard card
UI: Leaderboard table has columns: #, Agent, Loans, Sanctioned, Disbursed, Disbursed #, Conversion
UI: Leaderboard shows 2 agents with medal icons for rankings
UI: Admin sidebar shows Onboarding link
UI: Manager sidebar shows Onboarding link
UI: Agent sidebar does NOT show Onboarding link (correct role restriction)
UI: Onboarding page accessible at /onboarding for admin
UI: Onboarding wizard Step 1 - Basic Info form (name, email, password, role)
UI: Onboarding wizard Step 2 - Team assignment (team code, manager select)
UI: Onboarding wizard Step 3 - Bank assignment with 97 bank checkboxes and search
UI: Onboarding wizard Step 4 - Category (6) and Product (6) checkboxes
UI: Onboarding wizard Step 5 - Review page shows summary with Create Agent button
UI: Manager Dashboard shows Team Performance Leaderboard

team_leaderboard.ui_display: Trophy icon, medal icons for top 3, conversion rate badges

steps.step1: Basic Info - name, email, password, role (agent/manager)
steps.step3: Bank Assignment - 97 banks with search and multi-select checkboxes
steps.step4: Category & Product - 6 categories, 6 products with checkboxes
steps.step5: Review - summary of all selections, Create Agent/Manager button

role_based_sidebar.admin: Dashboard, Month MIS, Loans, Analytics, Schemes, Master File, Users, Onboarding, Statuses, Field Config, DB Backup, Settings
role_based_sidebar.manager: Dashboard, Month MIS, Loans, Analytics, Onboarding

context_for_next_testing_agent: Team Performance Leaderboard and Agent Onboarding Wizard features fully tested and working. Leaderboard aggregates loan data by agent_name, ranks by disbursed_amount descending. Onboarding wizard uses POST /api/auth/register to create users. Role-based access control working correctly - only admin and manager can see Onboarding link in sidebar. Master data: 97 banks, 6 categories, 6 products. All data-testid attributes working correctly for testing.
